Design SystemColors, typography, icons, avatars, images, effects and tokens

Theme Tokens

Dark Themedark

Typography System

Heading, body, caption and label styles.

display sample text
32px / 40px / 700
title sample text
22px / 28px / 600
h1 sample text
20px / 26px / 600
h2 sample text
18px / 24px / 600
h3 sample text
16px / 22px / 600
bodyLarge sample text
15px / 22px / 400
body sample text
14px / 20px / 400
bodySmall sample text
12px / 16px / 400
caption sample text
11px / 14px / 500
label sample text
10px / 12px / 700

Spacing, Radius, Shadow, Blur and Stroke

Foundation values used by buttons, cards, modals and overlays.

spacing.xs
4px
spacing.sm
8px
spacing.md
12px
spacing.lg
16px
spacing.xl
24px
spacing.2xl
32px
radius.none
0px
radius.xs
6px
radius.sm
8px
radius.md
12px
radius.lg
16px
radius.xl
20px
radius.full
9999px
shadow.none
none
shadow.soft
0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)
shadow.medium
0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10)
shadow.strong
0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.20)
shadow.modal
0 24px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35)
shadow.fab
0 4px 20px rgba(108, 92, 231, 0.45)
blur.none
0px
blur.light
8px
blur.medium
16px
blur.strong
24px
stroke.hairline
0.5px
stroke.default
1px
stroke.strong
1.5px
stroke.focus
3px
